title: Hermes Projection
description: Defines how a verified capability is made usable by Hermes. A capability without a projection is not yet a Hermes power.

kind.description: The projection mechanism that makes this capability usable by Hermes.

id.description: Unique identifier for this projection. For MCP tools this is the tool name; for skills this is the skill slug.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in Hermes's tool/skill surface.

whenToUse.description: Description of when Hermes should invoke this capability. Used in recall ranking and tool selection.

invocation.description: The invocation string or command that triggers this capability. For MCP tools this is the tool call pattern; for CLI wrappers this is the command.

inputContract.description: Optional reference to the JSON Schema defining valid inputs.

outputContract.description: Optional reference to the JSON Schema defining expected outputs.

costNotes.description: Optional notes about cost, rate limits, or resource usage.

failureModes.description: Known failure modes for this capability. Helps Hermes decide when NOT to use it.

verificationRef.description: Reference to the verification evidence (e.g. manifest verify block path, execution evidence artifact path).
